message:
feat: add realistic end-to-end pipeline benchmarks

New benchmarks for real-world use cases:

1. bench_rag_pipeline - RAG search pipeline
   - Document chunking, embedding, vector search
   - 50K chunks, 384-dim embeddings, top-K retrieval

2. bench_hybrid_search - Vector + SQL hybrid search
   - E-commerce product search with filters
   - price < 100 AND category = X AND in_stock
   - Compares vector-first vs filter-first strategies

3. bench_feature_engineering - ML transformations
   - Z-score normalization, log transform
   - Feature crossing, binning
   - 1M rows throughput testing

4. bench_analytics - Business intelligence queries
   - Simple aggregations (SUM, AVG, COUNT)
   - GROUP BY with 50 categories
   - DISTINCT counts with bitmap

5. bench_embedding_pipeline - Text to vector
   - Document chunking with overlap
   - Tokenization simulation
   - L2 normalization

All benchmarks compare LanceQL vs DuckDB/Polars.
